intro_cards.title: Casual Obligation: なくちゃ
intro_cards.body:
なくちゃ is a very casual shortening of なくてはいけない — 'gotta ~' / 'have to ~.'

Formation: なくてはいけない → なくちゃ (drop いけない)
• 行かなくてはいけない → 行かなくちゃ (gotta go)

• 宿題しなくちゃ。(I gotta do my homework.)
• そろそろ帰らなくちゃ。(I gotta head home soon.)

Similar casual forms:
• なきゃ (even shorter): 行かなきゃ
• なくちゃいけない (full casual form)

Very common in informal conversation — you'll hear this constantly in natural Japanese.
